description: Installs Node.js (LTS) via Chocolatey, configures npm, and installs Yarn, Bun, and npx.

messages.addingToPath: Adding npm global bin to PATH: {path}
messages.scriptDisabled: Node.js installation is disabled in config.
messages.nodeNotFound: Node.js not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.npxMissing: npx not found -- it should ship with npm. Check your Node.js installation.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install Node.js, configure npm, install extras (default)
commands.configure: Configure npm prefix and PATH only
commands.extras: Install Yarn, Bun, and verify npx only
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
